item.title: SportsCenter: Alan Shipnuck reposteó SportsCenter @SportsCenter · 6h "Maybe LIV can endure if they can find some other funding. ... Bu
item.description:
Alan Shipnuck reposteó SportsCenter @SportsCenter · 6h "Maybe LIV can endure if they can find some other funding. ... But, LIV Golf as we know it, ... appears to be coming to an end."
Sports Writer @AlanShipnuck joins the @RichEisenShow and speaks on the current state of LIV Golf 1:24 59 38 344 174 mil

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 4min Ludvig Aberg ranks this week:
1st in birdies made (8) 1st in Scrambling (4/4) 1st in Bogey Avo
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 4min Ludvig Aberg ranks this week:
1st in birdies made (8) 1st in Scrambling (4/4) 1st in Bogey Avoidance (0) 1st in 3-Putt Avoidance (0) 1st in Fairway Proximity (18'4") 1st in Putting Inside 10 feet (15/15) 1st in Driving Distance (332.3 yards)
Is that good? 4 1 34 5 mil

item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 3h Rory is just over two years from matching Tiger's all time record of most weeks spent as
item.description: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 3h Rory is just over two years from matching Tiger's all time record of most weeks spent as a top 10 player in the world. 37 33 1 mil 203 mil

item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 6min En respuesta a @KylePorterNS yes, I am definitely making the case that Tiger and Rory
item.description: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 6min En respuesta a @KylePorterNS yes, I am definitely making the case that Tiger and Rory are equals here. That is exactly the point of the tweet. 1 11 1 mil
